description: Continuation ofMATH 751. Cohomology, Universal Coefficient Theorem, Kunneth Formula, cup and cap products, applications to manifolds, orientability, Poincare Duality. Differential forms, integration and Stokes Theorem, De Rham Theorem. Calculations, further duality theorems, Euler class, Lefschetz Fixed-Point Theorem.

optimized_prerequisites.prerequisites_text: Graduate/professional standing or member of the Pre-Masters Mathematics (Visiting International) Program

prerequisites.prerequisites_text: Graduate/professional standing or member of the Pre-Masters Mathematics (Visiting International) Program
